calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp 1094.5
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kenneth Sheppard, Esq. of CLIFFORD JONES, T:415.431.5310, for petitioner/moving party;
Rebecca Liu, Esq., CCSF Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3870, for respondent/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. After arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITIONER TERRY FITZSIMMONS Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus, as follows:

Petitioner Terry Fitzsimmons' petition for writ of administrative mandamus is granted.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
